Dexterity: Increases Block gained from cards by X.
Energy: Resource used to play cards. You gain Energy at the start of each turn.
Focus: Increases the effectiveness of Orbs by X.
Intangible: Reduce ALL damage taken and HP loss to 1 this turn. (lasts X turns)
Mantra: When you gain 10 Mantra, enter Divinity.
Metallicize: At the end of your/its turn, gain X Block.
Plated Armor: At the end of your turn, gain X Block. Receiving unblocked attack damage reduces Plated Armor by 1.
Poison: At the beginning of its turn, the target loses X HP and 1 stack of Poison.
Regenerate: At the end of its turn, heals X HP.
Regeneration: At the end of your turn, heal X HP and reduce Regen by 1.
Ritual: At the end of its turn, gains X Strength.
Thorns: When attacked, deals X damage back.
Vulnerable: Target takes 50% more damage from attacks.
